title: STM32 RS485 industrial node benchmark fixture
representative_intent: STM32 3.3V RS485 Modbus node with 24V input protection

requirements.text: Represent protected 24 V industrial input with explicit over-voltage and reverse-polarity review evidence.
Generate a verified 3.3 V logic rail for STM32 MCU and RS485 transceiver loads.
Connect half-duplex RS485 A/B bus, direction control, termination, and fail-safe bias evidence.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, current-density, and isolation/protection review evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not industrial safety approval.
The fixture does not claim EMC, surge, isolation, thermal, manufacturability, or production readiness.
